page: Vultr vcg-l40s-32c-375g-96vram is a Cloud GPU server configured with an Intel x86_64 architecture. The system features 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core under a shared CPU allocation model. It is equipped with 375.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 11.72 GB of RAM per core.

The server integrates hardware acceleration via two NVIDIA L40S GPUs from the Ada Lovelace architecture family, providing a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 2200 GB NVMe SSD. Additionally, the configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

The shared CPU allocation presents a potential tradeoff for workloads requiring sustained, exclusive CPU performance, though this is balanced by the high density of GPU and memory resources. This hardware profile is designed for GPU-intensive workloads, including machine learning inference, large language model deployment, data science tasks, and parallel processing applications that leverage the dual NVIDIA L40S accelerators and large memory capacity.
description: Vultr vcg-l40s-32c-375g-96vram is a Cloud GPU server designed for high-density parallel processing and memory-intensive workloads. Built on the Intel x86_64 architecture, it features 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs under a shared CPU allocation model, paired with 375.0 GB of system memory. Hardware acceleration is delivered by two NVIDIA L40S Ada Lovelace GPUs, providing a total of 96 GB of VRAM. Storage is supported by a local 2200 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. While the shared CPU allocation represents a resource-sharing tradeoff, the substantial GPU memory and system RAM make this server highly suitable for machine learning, data science, and complex rendering workloads.
og_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-32c-375g-96vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring 32 Intel vCPUs, 375 GB RAM, two NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM, and a 2200 GB NVMe SSD for intensive parallel computing.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-32c-375g-96vram is a Cloud GPU server with 32 Intel vCPUs, 375 GB RAM, dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs, and 2200 GB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A dual-GPU accelerated server featuring ninety-six gigabytes of VRAM, substantial system memory, and high-speed local NVMe storage for parallel workloads.
bullet_points: Dual NVIDIA L40S Ada Lovelace GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM
32 Intel x86_64 vCPUs with shared CPU allocation
375.0 GB of system memory providing 11.72 GB per core
2200 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
One complimentary public IPv4 address included
Optimized for machine learning, data science, and parallel processing
